Makefile for building Sphinx documentation with customizable options and targets.

# Purpose
This Makefile is used to automate the process of building Sphinx documentation. It defines several variables, such as `SPHINXOPTS`, `SPHINXBUILD`, `SOURCEDIR`, and `BUILDDIR`, which control the behavior of the Sphinx build process. The `help` target is included to provide users with guidance on available make targets by executing the Sphinx build command with the `help` option. The file also includes a catch-all target that routes any unspecified make targets to Sphinx's "make mode," allowing for flexible and dynamic handling of various build commands. The `.PHONY` directive is used to declare the `help` target as a phony target, ensuring that it is always executed when called.
